interaction_phrase: Technical Director of the National Security Agency's (NSA) Cybersecurity Directorate
occurrence_sentence: Neal Ziring, the Technical Director of the National Security Agency's (NSA) Cybersecurity Directorate, made the forecast during a recent public sector cybersecurity event hosted by Palo Alto Networks in Palo Alto.
